shared_attributes.features: short front legs, large eyes, thick tail

context.role: Player character airborne state during jump
context.screen_position: x=100px from left edge, y varies from 0px to -90px (maximum jump height)
context.usage_scenario: Displayed when player presses Space/Tap to jump over ground obstacles, remains visible during entire jump arc

visual_specification.shape: T-Rex dinosaur with both feet off ground in mid-jump pose
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art, hard edges, no gradients

animation.description: Single static frame held during entire jump duration (approximately 0.83 seconds at 60 FPS)

visual_specification.details: Both legs tucked slightly, body upright, tail extended, eyes open, frozen in mid-air pose

relationships.shared_with: Same dimensions as player_run and player_idle, same color scheme as all player states
relationships.differences_from: player_run and player_idle are animated (2 frames), player_duck has different dimensions (118x60px), player_dead has closed eyes

explicit_negations: No arc trail or jump lines
